title: HH Home Hut Indoor Clothes Airer - 4 Tier Folding Laundry Maiden Rack, Clothes Drying Rack, Dryer Rack, Clothes Horse - Perfect for Airing Clothes, Foldable, Compact and Sutiable For Outdoor
features: Versatile and Convenient - The HH Home Hut Clothes Airer Horse Folding 4 Tier is a must-have for your laundry needs. It offers 20M of drying space, making it perfect for drying a variety of clothes on the Line. Its lightweight and compact design allows for easy storage and quick setup. Ideal for indoor And Outdoor use, this clothes airer is a practical and efficient solution for your drying needs.

Easy to Use - Simply set up the HH Home Hut Clothes airer horse Folding 4 tier on a flat and even surface, ensure the locking mechanism is in place, and start hanging your washing. It's a perfect indoor solution for drying clothes, offering a generous drying area and a sturdy structure. Ideal for all types of clothes, it is a must-have in every laundry room.

The HH Home Hut Clothes airer horse Folding 4 tier is designed with a sturdy construction that can hold up to 10kg of laundry. It's perfect for indoor use, easy to set up and fold away for storage. Its 4 tiers provide ample space for drying your clothes evenly and efficiently. This clothes airer is an essential household item for any laundry day.
34 Hanging Bars (26 internal, 8 external) Lightweight Portable Strong & Durable Approx. Dimensions: 620mm (W) x 480mm (D) x 1750mm (H) Folded: 620mm (W) x 480mm (H) x 60mm

Benefit - With this spacious HH Home Hut Clothes Airer, you can easily dry your clothes indoors, saving money by reducing the need for a tumble dryer. Its foldable winged design makes it easy to store, while its durable construction ensures it can handle heavy washing loads. Perfect for drying clothes in any indoor setting.
